caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a brown wooden lectern equipped with two microphones, delivering a speech against a backdrop of textured green stone walls featuring a stepped geometric pattern and vertical decorative pillars with small red floral accents. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a white sleeveless Nehru jacket. As the scene progresses, he uses various hand gestures to emphasize his points: initially, he holds both hands up and open; then, he raises his right index finger pointedly toward the ceiling. Subsequently, he gestures with both hands open in front of him, and finally, he returns to a more neutral stance with his arms at his sides. His expression remains focused and animated throughout the sequence, and there is no on-screen text or logos present in the frames.
